catalyst_summary: PPI release pre-market + 30-year bond auction PM + Fed chair nomination vote (Powell-to-Warsh transition). Plus CSCO + BABA + AMAT earnings Wednesday. CPI Tuesday already printed hot per 24/7 Wall St headline 'SPY Sinks on Higher Inflation' — yesterday's flush to 731.83 and recovery to 738.18 makes sense in that context.

primary_catalyst.description: April PPI release before market open (08:30 ET). Validates whether yesterday's CPI hot print extends to producer-level pricing pressure. PPI hot = SPY weak, bond yields up, dollar up.
primary_catalyst.fragility: binary_print — fade until print + first reaction bar

secondary_catalysts.description: Fed chair nomination vote — Powell-to-Warsh transition. The market has been pricing this through the rally; the actual vote outcome can amplify or unwind that pricing.
30-year Treasury bond auction afternoon. Weak auction = yields up = SPY weak via duration sensitivity. Strong auction = yields down = SPY supported.
CSCO (consensus EPS ~$0.92, rev ~$14B), BABA (consensus rev ~$36B), AMAT all report Wednesday. CSCO + AMAT have SPY-cap-weight relevance; BABA more China-trade-narrative.

vix_expectation: elevated entering open. CPI hot yesterday + PPI risk this morning + Fed transition = ALL pointing to wider IV. v14 bear gate (VIX > 17.30 and rising) is more likely to clear; v14 bull gate (VIX < 17.20 and falling) less likely. Bear setups have tailwind today.

key_levels_external.spy_translation_approx: SPY 740-743 area = SPX 7400-7430 zone. Above SPY 738 = bullish bias zone per external source.

spy_relevant_levels_tomorrow.source: 5/12 RTH low (the flush wick recovered from)

implication_for_setups.bearish_setup: FAVORED — VIX elevated + macro hot print risk + Fed transition uncertainty. v14 bear gate likely clears. If PPI prints hot pre-market, expect gap-down + bear continuation. Key trigger: 736.13 fail again on volume = clean SNIPER + v14 entry.
implication_for_setups.bullish_setup: DEFENSIVE — only triggers if PPI prints cool AND SPY reclaims 738.84 with ribbon BULL ≥30c. ≥2 triggers required (asymmetric).
implication_for_setups.sniper_setup: PRIMARY pattern to watch. ★★★ levels 736.13 + 733.55 + 740.43 are the candidates. Sniper bypasses 10:00 gate so it can fire during the post-PPI 09:30-10:00 reaction window — exactly where v14 was blind.
implication_for_setups.opening_drive_fade_setup: DRAFT/WATCH-ONLY. PPI day often has reversal patterns — first 30 min sets the extreme, then drift back. Good observation day for ODF watcher.

watch_for_reversal: PPI prints HOTTER than consensus (>0.3% headline or core) → SPY gap-down likely → bear setups armed at 736.13 retest
PPI prints COOLER than consensus → SPY gap-up likely → bull setups need 738.84 reclaim to fire
30-year auction TAILS by >2bp → yields spike → SPY weakness PM
Fed nomination unexpected vote outcome (failure, delay) → volatility spike + likely SPY weakness
